results.title: Starlight: what Raj Khosla taught me about fame, failure and legacy
results.description: Mahesh Bhatt reflects on his mentor Raj Khosla, the influence of Guru Dutt, and the lessons that shaped his life and career. In a moving tribute, he recalls fame, failure, legacy and the enduring power of artistic inheritance.

results.title: Rohit Sharma, Hardik Pandya cleared, set to feature in India’s ODI series against Afghanistan
results.description: Rohit Sharma and Hardik Pandya have reportedly been cleared to play for India in the upcoming ODI series against Afghanistan.

results.title: Can India win their first-ever Women's T20 World Cup? Australia conqueror opines
results.description: Indian women achieved their much-awaited glory when they bagged the ODI World Cup 2025 at home in November, ending their long wait for a first senior ICC title. The victory was a watershed moment in Indian women's cricket, a tribute to every legend who has contributed to the sport and a testament to the fact that this Indian team is mighty.
